title: Authorization to hire surveyors, procure field notes, and make surveys
doc_html:
PART II.  SURVEYS BY PARISHES

§151.  Authorization to hire surveyors, procure field notes, and make surveys

Any parish, except the Parish of Orleans, may procure necessary field notes from any previous survey and may employ one or more competent surveyors to survey or re-survey and establish or reestablish township lines, range lines, section corners, and half-mile stations where these have never been surveyed or established or where the original witness trees have been destroyed or lost.
doc_text:
PART II.  SURVEYS BY PARISHES
§151.  Authorization to hire surveyors, procure field notes, and make surveys
Any parish, except the Parish of Orleans, may procure necessary field notes from any previous survey and may employ one or more competent surveyors to survey or re-survey and establish or reestablish township lines, range lines, section corners, and half-mile stations where these have never been surveyed or established or where the original witness trees have been destroyed or lost.
